caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a logo is seated in a podcast studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a stand. The background is a white wall featuring a repeating logo that says "EMBRACE HUSTLE" above several gold stars. To the man's right, red text reads "BOSS TALK 101." The lower portion of the screen displays two overlays: one on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and one on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, talking and slightly shifting his posture. By the final frame, his right arm is slightly raised and his hand is visible as he gestures while speaking.
